title: Expository Visualization on Grocery Store Foods
description: An interactive data visualization project analyzing nutritional data of grocery store foods, using D3.js to create informative charts that help consumers make healthier choices.

title: Smiski Prediction Algorithm
description: Developed a machine learning algorithm using computer vision to predict the locations of Smiski figurines in images, combining image processing and predictive modeling techniques.

title: Recipes Analysis Dashboard
description: Built an interactive dashboard to analyze recipe nutrition and ingredient patterns, using JavaScript and data visualization to help users compare food trends and meal ideas.

title: Internship Slackbot
description: Created an automated Slack bot during my internship to streamline team communication, handle notifications, and integrate with project management tools.

title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A responsive portfolio website built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to showcase my projects, skills, and experience in data science and web development.

title: Market Regime Classifier
description: Built a classifier using time series analysis and machine learning to identify different market regimes from financial data, helping in investment strategy optimization.
